notes: The engine ships ZERO banned phrases (§0.3 r6, §10.3): LINT.BANNED_PATTERN fires only against an operator-supplied phrase, threaded into the gate via the positive case's 'rules.banned_patterns' block. The SAME draft with the empty default list is the clean control — proving the brand-neutral default never fires. FM.BANNED_CONSTRUCTION (construction CLASSES) is the LLM-judged half.

cases.name: banned-phrase
cases.notes: Operator-supplied phrase 'working demos' appears in the Recommended variant. Deterministic, hard.

cases.name: clean
cases.notes: Identical draft, empty banned-pattern list (the shipped default) — the brand-neutral engine fires nothing.

cases.name: banned-construction
cases.notes: Banned opener/closer construction classes ('In a world where', 'without further ado', 'buckle up').

cases.name: construction-clean
cases.notes: Clean control for FM.BANNED_CONSTRUCTION: opens on the concrete anchor, no banned construction class.
